queryzdthe operation to be performed. export or unexport virtual disk, query: Check if filename is exported)
choices
help
filenamez!filename is a disk image filename)
--snapshot
znload an internal snapshot inside filename and export it as an read-only device. Required op is export or query)
defaultr
